content:
Hi there 👋, I am a PhD student at the University of Helsinki 🇫🇮 under the supervision of Luigi Acerbi and Samuel Kaski. My research is funded by the Finnish Doctoral Program Network in Artificial Intelligence and focuses on probabilistic machine learning and amortized Bayesian inference.
Previously, I obtained my Master’s degree from the Eindhoven University of Technology (TU/e) 🇳🇱 and my Bachelor’s degree from Nankai University 🇨🇳, both in Computer Science.
summary: Hi there 👋, I am a PhD student at the University of Helsinki 🇫🇮 under the supervision of Luigi Acerbi and Samuel Kaski. My research is funded by the Finnish Doctoral Program Network in Artificial Intelligence and focuses on probabilistic machine learning and amortized Bayesian inference.
title: Yang Yang

summary: PriorGuide enables efficient incorporation of arbitrary priors at inference time for amortized diffusion-based simulation-based inference, without retraining the model.
title: PriorGuide: Test-Time Prior Adaptation for Simulation-Based Inference

summary: We propose an architecture extension to existing tabular foundations to generate joint predictive samples ~20x faster with minimal increase in training overhead and drop in performance.
title: Efficient Autoregressive Inference for Transformer Probabilistic Models

summary: We propose a formal framework for probabilistic multi-dimensional classification.
title: Probabilistic Multi-Dimensional Classification

summary: We develop Bayesian structure scores for deterministic PCs, i.e., the structure likelihood with parameters marginalized out.
title: Bayesian Structure Scores for Probabilistic Circuits

summary: We propose Generalized Bayesian Network Classifier (GBNC), a generalized framework for solving probabilistic multi-dimensional classification problems with complex types of input.
title: Generalized Bayesian Network Classifiers

content:
May 2023
🏫 I will be in Ljubljana 🇸🇮 to attend the European Summer School on Artificial Intelligence (ESSAI) from 24 - 28 July 2023. May 2023
🎉 Our work on Probabilistic Multi-Dimensional Classification has been accepted to UAI 2023. This is joint work with Vu-Linh Nguyen and Cassio de Campos. Jan 2023
🎉 Our work on Bayesian Structure Scores for Probabilistic Circuits has been accepted to AISTATS 2023. This is joint work with Robert Peharz and Gennaro Gala. Nov 2022
🎓 I have graduated Cum Laude from TU Eindhoven with a Master’s degree in Computer Science and Engineering. Check out my thesis here.
title: News
